title: OpenAI proposes 5% stake to Trump administration to ease Washington pressure: Report
summary_full: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."
summary_public: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."
